name: Conjure Elemental
description: You conjure a Large, intangible spirit from the Elemental Planes that appears in an unoccupied space within range. Choose the spirit's element, which determines its damage type: air (Lightning), earth (Thunder), fire (Fire), or water (Cold). The spirit lasts for the duration. Each creature of your choice in a 15-foot-radius Emanation originating from the spirit must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d8 damage of the spirit's type on a failed save or half as much on a success. As a Bonus Action, you can move the spirit up to 30 feet. When using a higher-level spell slot, the damage increases by 2d8 for each slot level above 5.
